llm_advice.rationale: Baseline shows bottleneck is multiple ATen launches. Combining B.T @ X and A @ (result) into a single custom kernel reduces launch overhead and intermediate memory traffic. Starting with a scalar kernel (block_size=256, vector_width=1) minimizes risk, then vectorized (float4) version may improve bandwidth.

notes: Use ATen/cuBLAS for the d x d GEMM.
Explore kernels that fuse Y += A @ T for rank 16.
